ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the market is located */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or type of market (e.g., Farmers Market, Farm Stand) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the market */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the market */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude of the market location */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude of the market location */,
  "hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the market */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the market */,
  "fm_senior" TEXT /* Whether the market offers senior discounts */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the market for better location-based searches */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the market */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the market's social media profiles */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the market listing is claimed by a manager */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the market was claimed */,
  "accepted_payment_methods" TEXT /* Payment methods accepted by the market (e.g., credit card, cash, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "is_seasonal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sector is seasonal */,
  "peak_season" TEXT /* Peak season for the sector (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market offering the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., fruits, vegetables, dairy) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., lb, kg, dozen) */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently available */,
  "organic" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is organic */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the image belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader" TEXT /* Name of the person who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Count of users who found the review helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review was written by a verified purchaser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered on the platform */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last visit to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the order was placed for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of each individual item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "final_cost" REAL /* Final cost of the item after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment was made for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_managers" (
  "market_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market manager */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the manager is responsible for */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the market manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the market manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the market manager */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the manager registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the manager's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_managers_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales, event) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_reports_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)
